author: slowomir33-arch
name: LOGOS-44 Z=0: Toroidal CDMA Field Decoder (44-pass iterative routing)
blurb: Non-transformer architecture: 44 iterative passes through a shared toroidal bottleneck (sin·cos rank-64) with 128-signal CDMA field decoder and coherence gating. ~4.5M params with tied 1024-vocab embeddings. Explores compute-depth over parameter-count scaling. Muon optimizer + int8+zlib compression.
note: Experimental architecture — val_bpb TBD after 8xH100 training run.
